title: Modified Three Peaks Protocol for Power Soil DNA Isolation Kit
author: Chiara Mazzoni
materials: The DNA is now ready for downstream applications.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5,000 rcf for 00:05:00...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5,000 rcf for 00:05:00 and transfer up to all 400 uL of DNA/RNA Shield added previously in step 1 - [1.1 sup] to set 2.

steps.title: In a 1 stool
steps.instruction: In a 1 stool : 1 solvent ratio - Combine the stool pellet with 200 uL of PBS and resuspend by 1000P pipetting.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5,000 x rcf for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5,000 x rcf for 00:05:00 and transfer up to all 200 uL of PBS added previously in step 4.1 - [1.2 sup] to set 2.

steps.title: Add 700 uL PBS and 3-4...
steps.instruction: Add 700 uL PBS and 3-4 sterilised glass beads to the pellet. Homogenize the sample on a Tissue lyser for 2 min at 25 speed in order to suspend the sample and detach microbiota from dietary fibres [the homogenization step is repeated until faecal pellets are completely dissolved].

steps.title: Centrifuge at low speed (35 rcf,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at low speed (35 rcf, 20 min) to separate larger fecal particles from bacteria and transfer as much supernatant as possible (~600 uL) to set 3. Throw set 1 containing glass beads and debris.

steps.title: In a 60 solvent
steps.instruction: In a 60 solvent : 1 enzyme ratio - Add 10 uL of MetaPolyzyme and mix by gentle 1000P pipetting.

steps.title: Incubate at 35 °C for 3 h with no agitation
steps.instruction: Incubate at 35 °C for 3 h with no agitation. Spheroplasts (cells without cell wall) form across incubation time.

steps.title: In a 10 solvent:1 chemical:1 enzyme...
steps.instruction: In a 10 solvent:1 chemical:1 enzyme ratio - Add 60 uL 10 % (w/v) SDS and 60 uL of Proteinase K [20 mg/mL] and mix by gentle 1000P pipetting. Incubate at 55 °C for 00:30:00 with 300 rpm agitation.

steps.title: Gently mix by flicking to ensure...
steps.instruction: Gently mix by flicking to ensure the solution is homogeneous before proceeding.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5,000 rcf for 00:05:00...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5,000 rcf for 00:05:00 and transfer up to ~ 600 uL of PBS added in step 5.1 [2° supernatant] to set 4.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet of set 3...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet of set 3 in 00 uL of C1 Lysis Solution (Power Soil Kit).

steps.title: Transfer to a PowerBead Tube (spin down still empty)
steps.instruction: Transfer to a PowerBead Tube (spin down still empty). Vortex briefly. Bead-beat on a Vortex adapter for 5 minutes at speed 10.

steps.title: Centrifuge tube at 15,000 rcf for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge tube at 15,000 rcf for 00:02:00 and transfer up to all the C1 Lysis Solution in set 5.

steps.title: Now perform all the following steps...
steps.instruction: Now perform all the following steps on set 2, set 4 and set 5 separately.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 15,000 rcf for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 15,000 rcf for 00:01:00. Avoiding the pellet, transfer up to 700 µl of supernatant to a clean 2 ml Microcentrifuge Tube (provided). Note : Expect 500–600 µl.

steps.title: Add 1:1 ratio of Solution CD3...
steps.instruction: Add 1:1 ratio of Solution CD3 (600 µl) and invert the tube for 5 times. Note : Solution CD3 is a high-concentration salt solution. Because DNA binds tightly to silica at high salt concentrations, Solution CD3 will adjust the DNA solution salt concentration to allow binding of DNA.

steps.title: If you ran 23 step twice,...
steps.instruction: If you ran 23 step twice, then add 900 uL of Solution CD3 .

steps.title: Load 650-670 uL of the lysate...
steps.instruction: Load 650-670 uL of the lysate (keep the rest) onto an MB Spin Column and centrifuge at 15,000 rcf for 00:01:00. Note : DNA is selectively bound to the silica membrane, contaminants pass through the filter membrane.

steps.title: Discard the flow-through and repeat step...
steps.instruction: Discard the flow-through and repeat step 26 with the lysate that has left. Carefully place the MB Spin Column into a clean 2 ml Collection Tube. Avoid splashing any flow-through onto the MB Spin Column.

steps.title: Add 500 uL of Solution EA...
steps.instruction: Add 500 uL of Solution EA to the MB Spin Column. Centrifuge at 15,000 rcf for 00:01:00. Note : Solution EA is a wash buffer that removes protein and other non-aqueous contaminants from the MB Spin Column filter membrane.

steps.title: Discard the flow-through and place the...
steps.instruction: Discard the flow-through and place the MB Spin Column back into the same 2 ml Collection Tube.

steps.title: Add 500 uL of Solution C5...
steps.instruction: Add 500 uL of Solution C5 to the MB Spin Column. Centrifuge at 15,000 rcf for 00:01:00. Note : Solution C5 is an ethanol-based wash solution used to further clean the bound DNA from residual salt, humic acid, contaminants.

steps.title: Discard the flow-through and place the...
steps.instruction: Discard the flow-through and place the MB Spin Column into a clean 2 ml Collection Tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at up to 16,000 rcf for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at up to 16,000 rcf for 00:02:00. Carefully place the MB Spin Column into a new 1.5 ml Elution Tube. Note : It is critical to remove all traces of Solution C5 because the ethanol in it can interfere with downstream DNA applications, such as PCR and gel electrophoresis.

steps.title: Add 70 uL (50-100 uL) of...
steps.instruction: Add 70 uL (50-100 uL) of Solution C6 (low in salt -10 mM Tris) to the center of the white filter membrane. Centrifuge at 15,000 rcf for 00:01:00. Note : Placing Solution C6 in the center of the small white membrane will result in a more efficient and complete release of the DNA.

steps.title: Set # End point Volume Content...
steps.instruction: Set # End point Volume Content Tube type 1 set 1 discard pellet glass beads and solids 2ml 2 set 2 first peak 600 uL DNA shield +PBS 1.5 ml 3 set 3 transfer to power bead set pellet 2ml 4 power bead set (Power Soil Kit) bead beating silica beads + debris 5 set 4 second peak 600 uL PBS+ metapolyzyme +SDS+proK 1.5 ml 6 set 5 third peak 600 uL C1 lysis solution 1.5 ml

steps.title: In a 1 stool
steps.instruction: In a 1 stool : 2 solvent ratio - Combine 200 mg of fresh stool with 400 uL of DNA/RNA Shield in set 1 and vortex briefly.

steps.title: Add 200 µl of Solution CD2...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µl of Solution CD2 and invert the tube for 5 times. Note : Solution CD2 (IRT) precipitates non-DNA organic and inorganic material including humic substances, cell debris, and proteins.
